name: Eval Harness as a Service
problem: Small AI-PM teams keep rebuilding the same golden-set → re-score → diff pipeline. Offer it as a hosted tool with a drop-in SDK, shadow-traffic mode, and per-prompt-version accuracy deltas.
hardestTech: Deterministic re-scoring at scale, drift detection

name: Cost-Per-Answer Calculator
problem: Every AI team underestimates unit economics until an invoice lands. A live calculator that takes model, tokens-in, tokens-out, cache hit rate, and batch size → returns $/request + $/user/month + envelope check.
hardestTech: Keeping provider pricing fresh without manual updates

name: PRD → Eval Set Converter
problem: PMs write PRDs; engineers ship without measurable acceptance. Parse a PRD's success criteria into a structured eval set (golden cases, scoring rubric, pass/fail gate) before a single line of code.

name: Churn-Risk Explainer
problem: Churn models output a score; CS teams need a *reason*. Produce a one-sentence, feature-level explanation per at-risk user, ranked by recoverability.

name: Plant-Health Citizen Dataset
problem: Aarkid's golden set is 50 photos. Crowdsource a labelled dataset (10k+ photos across failure modes) with contributor attribution and licence clarity.
hardestTech: Quality control without a paid review team

name: Meeting → Decision Log
problem: Transcripts are noise. Extract *decisions made*, *blockers raised*, and *owners assigned* into a searchable log that survives the meeting.

name: Interview-Loop Feedback Aggregator
problem: Hiring loops collect 4 independent writeups, then drown in a debrief Slack thread. Aggregate them into a structured rubric summary + dissenting-opinion highlight before the debrief.
pmSkill: Hiring process design, signal vs noise

name: Aviation Ops Anomaly Feed
problem: Aviation ops teams drown in green-dashboard fatigue. A feed that only surfaces anomalies (delay drivers, crew-conflict clusters, gate-change cascades) with root-cause breadcrumbs.

name: Reading-Log → Idea Graph
problem: Highlights sit in Readwise; ideas sit in notes; neither talk. Build a graph view where highlights cluster by concept and surface adjacency between books.
hardestTech: Embeddings + clustering that survives new additions

name: Open-Source Contribution Scout
problem: First-time contributors can't find tractable issues. Given a GitHub profile + stack, surface good-first-issues across repos filtered by real complexity (not just the label).
hardestTech: Inferring issue difficulty from diff patterns

name: Micro-SaaS Unit-Economics Sim
problem: Solo founders need a back-of-envelope that accepts MRR curve, CAC, churn, infra cost/user, and returns month-by-month cash + break-even date without a spreadsheet.
hardestTech: Sensible defaults so the UI isn't a tax return

name: AI-PM Interview Prep Kit
problem: AI-PM interview loops are new enough that nobody has a clean rubric. Ship a structured practice kit: problem framings, eval-design exercises, cost-envelope drills, mock transcripts with feedback.
